general_features: Auto-Silence Removal: Automatically cuts out awkward pauses and 'umms'.
AI B-Roll Generation: Suggests and inserts stock footage based on what you are saying.
Auto-Zoom: Keeps the speaker centered in the frame dynamically.
Multi-Language Captions: Supports generating subtitles in over 50 languages.

policies.support: 24/7 support available only on Pro and Enterprise plans

faqs.export_formats: We currently support exporting in MP4 and MOV formats.
faqs.max_file_size: Basic plan users can upload up to 2GB per project. Pro and Enterprise users can upload up to 10GB per project.
